title: angelica lineariloba
intro: Angelica lineariloba, also known as Chinese angelica or dong quai, is a species of plant in the carrot family native to China, Japan, and Korea. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to regulate the menstrual cycle and alleviate symptoms of menopause, as well as to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. The health benefits of angelica lineariloba include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Angelica lineariloba can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and infusions, which can be used to address a range of health issues.
